title: BirdBrain
description: If birds can find their heading, so can you.
body:
![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1e2c9ace52a17d62413780144ee2d41494b033.png)

### Hello there!
A very tiny QOL mod that allows autorun and auto travel (boat for now).

### Features
- Auto run / travel with a configurable key
- Arrow keys to change direction, up for north, left for west, right for east and down for south
- Autojump activated when autorun is activated.

### Usage/Settings
- Keys are edited in Minecrafts regular options.

### Default Keys
- Auto run/row - Mouse button 5, forward thumb button.
- Direction - Arrow keys, up for north, right for east and so on.

### ToDo
- Config screen
- Travel for Horses, Donkeys, Mules and Happy Ghasts (1.21.5+)
- Clearer indications

* * *
### Disclaimer
I am not a full time programmer and do this on my free time, updates are not going to be frequent, but I will try to keep mods alive over coming versions.
As of now, there are no plans for NeoForge or Forge.
